name: med-autoscience
description: Codex plugin shell for the MedAutoScience medical research orchestration runtime.

interface.shortDescription: Agent-first medical research runtime for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a thin Codex plugin entry for MedAutoScience while preserving the existing Python CLI, controller contracts, profile binding, and DeepScientist overlay workflow.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap a MedAutoScience workspace profile for this study.
Run MedAutoScience doctor and tell me what is missing.
Use MedAutoScience controllers to audit this quest runtime.
